top_signals.title: CoreWeave-Tied Data Center’s Junk Bond Sale Seeks $850 Million
top_signals.summary: Elk Grove Village Property LLC is looking to raise $850 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., joining a wave of high-yield issuers tapping debt markets to fund artificial intelligence infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data
top_signals.summary:
Bond traders are looking to a key jobs report this week to confirm their wagers that the US economy is strong enough to push the Federal Reserve to lift interest rates by next year.
Nancy Lazar, Chief Global Economist a Piper Sandler, previews this week's jobs figures and whether or not they'll put the Fed in a position to hike rates. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: S&P 500 Hangs Close to Record as Tech Gains Offset Broad Losses
top_signals.summary: Sarah Hunt, Chief Market Strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, discusses the market melt up as earnings and AI enthusiasm push equities higher. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
